heading: Omitted
label: 1300c–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for the withholding of a portion of the judgment funds for expert witnesses or other programing needs in certain claims, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–468, § 286 Stat. 782Oct. 6, 1972
